section.heading: Fission and fusion energy materials research program

content.p: Along with the budget request of the President submitted to Congress for fiscal year 2007, the Secretary shall establish a research and development program on material science issues presented by advanced fission reactors and the fusion energy program of the Department.

subsection.heading: Administration
subsection.chapeau: In carrying out the program, the Secretary shall develop—

paragraph.content: a catalog of material properties required for applications described in subsection (a);
theoretical models for materials possessing the required properties;
benchmark models against existing data; and
a roadmap to guide further research and development in the area covered by the program.
